prediction.chief_complaint: itchy red rash on forearms and back of knees for two weeks
plan: switch to gentle, fragrance-free body wash
apply thick fragrance-free moisturizer twice a day, especially within 3 minutes after showers
triamcinolone 0.1% ointment to affected areas twice daily for up to 2 weeks
cetirizine 10 mg once daily for itch
return if not improving in 2 weeks or signs of skin infection
